words.definition_vi: phụ thuộc vào, quay trục quanh; một vấn đề/quyết định chính yếu phụ thuộc vào điều gì
words.definition_en: to depend critically on; to turn or rotate around a central point or issue
words.example_sentence: The success of the environmental policy pivots on whether governments can secure international cooperation.

words.definition_vi: làm sáng tỏ, giải thích; cung cấp thông tin giúp hiểu rõ hơn
words.definition_en: to clarify or explain something; to provide information that helps understanding
words.example_sentence: Recent archaeological discoveries cast light on the daily life of ancient civilizations.

words.definition_vi: có nguồn gốc từ, bắt nguồn từ; có nền tảng sâu sắc trong
words.definition_en: to have origins or foundations in; to be fundamentally based on
words.example_sentence: Many modern social conflicts are rooted in historical inequalities and unresolved tensions.

words.definition_vi: làm tình huống trở nên tồi tệ hơn, làm phức tạp thêm vấn đề
words.definition_en: to make a problem worse or more complicated
words.example_sentence: Lack of funding compounds the problem of inadequate healthcare in rural areas.

words.definition_vi: thuận lợi cho, tạo điều kiện cho; có khả năng dẫn đến
words.definition_en: to create favorable conditions for; to promote or encourage
words.example_sentence: A calm and organized workspace is conducive to productivity and creative thinking.

words.definition_vi: làm suy yếu, phá hoại; xói mòn từng chút một
words.definition_en: to weaken or damage something gradually; to erode confidence or authority
words.example_sentence: Misinformation on social media undermines public trust in scientific institutions.

words.definition_vi: đứng đầu, nằm ở vị trí tiên phong; dẫn đầu trong lĩnh vực nào đó
words.definition_en: to be in the leading position; to be at the front of a movement or development
words.example_sentence: Nordic countries are at the forefront of renewable energy adoption in Europe.

words.definition_vi: đầy rẫy, chứa đầy (những khó khăn, nguy hiểm); tràn ngập
words.definition_en: full of or accompanied by something undesirable; loaded with difficulties
words.example_sentence: The process of globalization is fraught with both opportunities and challenges.

words.definition_vi: mở đường cho, tạo điều kiện cho; chuẩn bị nền tảng cho
words.definition_en: to make it possible for something to happen; to prepare the ground for
words.example_sentence: The invention of the internet paved the way for the digital revolution.

words.definition_vi: là dấu hiệu của, phản ánh; cho thấy, biểu hiện
words.definition_en: to be a sign or symptom of; to suggest or point to
words.example_sentence: Rising unemployment figures are indicative of economic slowdown in the region.
